evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A temporarily unreachable dependency may use an idempotent deletion queue and minimum reconciliation tombstone; it may not preserve ordinary access to the deleted data.
statement: A deletion event MUST cascade through every app-owned primary, derived, cached, queued, indexed, attached, backed-up where controllable, and offline copy, or retain only the minimum tombstone required to complete and reconcile deletion.
